steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The blank describes what cities are doing with programs. The sentence continues: "establishing reward points and other incentives for shopping at small businesses." Cities are actively creating and putting these programs into effect — so the blank needs a word meaning to formally start or establish.

steps.title: Eliminate and match
steps.content:
• Choice A — instituting: means to establish or put into effect. Fits perfectly with cities launching these incentive programs. ✓
  • Choice B — occupying: means forcibly holding possession of something. A city cannot "occupy" a program — this is logically incoherent. ✗
  • Choice C — underestimating: means failing to recognize value. The text shows cities are actively promoting small-business shopping, not doubting it. ✗
  • Choice D — encountering: means coming into contact with something. The cities are creating these programs, not stumbling upon them. ✗
A is correct.
